heading: Refusal of entry
label: 6717 Refusal of entry
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under .Jan. 1, 2005section 859(c) of Pub. L. 108–357section 4083 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under .Jan. 1, 2005section 859(c) of Pub. L. 108–357section 4083 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In addition to any other penalty provided by law, any person who refuses to admit entry or refuses to permit any other action by the Secretary authorized by section 4083(d)(1) shall pay a penalty of $1,000 for such refusal.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If a penalty is imposed under this section on any business entity, each officer, employee, or agent of such entity or other contracting party who willfully participated in any act giving rise to such penalty shall be jointly and severally liable with such entity for such penalty.

children.heading: Affiliated groups
children.label: 2 Affiliated groups
children.text: If a business entity described in paragraph (1) is part of an affiliated group (as defined in section 1504(a)), the parent corporation of such entity shall be jointly and severally liable with such entity for the penalty imposed under this section.

children.heading: Reasonable cause exception
children.label: c Reasonable cause exception
children.text: No penalty shall be imposed under this section with respect to any failure if it is shown that such failure is due to reasonable cause.
